title: pump operation
description: Operation block of a credo-pure incompressible-liquid pump.  Hardware-only: specify the shaft power W_shaft (W or kW, positive) and the pump efficiency eta.  The discharge pressure P_out (P_in + eta*W_shaft/(F*v_molar)) and the small dissipation temperature rise are RESULTS.  For 'pump to X bar' wrap the unit in a DesignSpec that manipulates $W_shaft with a target on this unit's P_out KPI (converges in one step --- the relation is linear).

W_shaft.title: Shaft power (hardware)
W_shaft.description: Mechanical power delivered to the liquid (motor rating).  Positive.

eta.title: Pump efficiency
eta.description: Hydraulic + mechanical efficiency: useful v*dP work / shaft work.  0 < eta <= 1.  The (1-eta) fraction heats the liquid (a small dT).
